stevenson_rhamondre.name: Rhamondre Stevenson
strengths: Workhorse role — 207 carries and 41 targets in 2024
Strong red zone usage — 7 rush TDs in both 2024 and 2025
Reliable pass-catcher; 69 receptions in 2022 peak season
risks: Shared backfield with TreVeyon Henderson (missed time late 2025)
Patriots O-line ranked bottom-5 in run blocking (2024)
Low ADP upside — consensus RB31, limited ceiling on bad offense
stevenson_rhamondre.analysis: Stevenson is a high-volume RB2 with a capped ceiling on a rebuilding Patriots offense. His value comes from sheer touches — double-digit carries and 35-40 targets annually. The red zone TD rate (7 TDs in each of the last two seasons) keeps his floor livable. In PPR, he's a solid RB2/flex with handcuff appeal if Henderson misses time. 2026 projection: ~149 PPR points (FantasyPros consensus).

news.headline: Stevenson entering 2026 as RB1 on depth chart
news.detail: Patriots staff confirmed Stevenson leads the backfield heading into camp despite Henderson's presence. Volume expected to remain high.

news.headline: Toe injury from 2025 fully healed
news.detail: Stevenson missed 3 games in Week 8 with a toe injury in 2025. Cleared medically with no limitations reported at OTAs.
